name: Cacoo Online Diagramming Tool API
what_it_does: Online diagramming and visual collaboration tool with REST API — enabling teams to create flowcharts, wireframes, UML diagrams, network diagrams, and mind maps collaboratively, with real-time editing, version history, Confluence/Jira integrations, and export to multiple formats via Nulab's product suite (with Backlog for PM and Typetalk for team chat).
use_cases: Creating and managing diagrams programmatically via Cacoo REST API for workflow automation
Integrating Cacoo diagrams into Confluence pages and Jira issues via Nulab's connectors
Exporting diagram content as SVG, PNG, or PDF via Cacoo API for documentation pipelines
Querying diagram folder structure and team member access for project governance
Embedding Cacoo diagrams in web applications via API-generated share links
not_for: High-fidelity UI design (use Figma for pixel-perfect interface design)
Complex interactive prototyping (use Axure or Proto.io for conditional logic prototypes)
Enterprise architecture modeling (use Archi or Sparx EA for TOGAF modeling)
best_when: A team already using Nulab products (Backlog, Typetalk) needs collaborative diagramming tightly integrated with their project management — or needs a Confluence-integrated diagramming tool at lower cost than Lucidchart.
avoid_when: You're not in the Nulab ecosystem, need advanced diagramming templates, or have teams already using Lucidchart or Draw.io where switching costs aren't justified.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. API key option for simpler integrations. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks — polling required for diagram change detection. Part of Nulab product suite (Backlog, Typetalk, Cacoo). Japanese company with strong Asia-Pacific market presence. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 6 sheets per diagram, 25 diagrams max
pricing.paid_tiers: $5/user/month (billed annually); $6/user/month (billed monthly); volume discounts for teams 30+
pricing.notes: Japanese company (Nulab Inc., Fukuoka). Founded 2004. Bootstrapped and profitable. Nulab is a Japanese software company with three products: Backlog (PM), Cacoo (diagramming), Typetalk (chat). Strong in Japanese market and Asia-Pacific. 3M+ registered users globally. Cacoo is competitive with Lucidchart but at lower price point. Real-time collaboration is core feature. Integrates with Backlog, Confluence, Google Drive, Dropbox.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests per minute; not publicly documented in detail

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 for diagrams, sheets, folders, and users. OAuth2 + API key auth. Decent documentation in English (primary market is Japanese so English docs may lag). No webhooks — polling required. Export API for SVG/PNG/PDF. Nulab API covers all three products with unified auth. Rate limits partially documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Diagram reads fully idempotent. Sheet reads idempotent. Diagram creation not idempotent — check by name. Export operations idempotent by diagram ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Japanese company — English documentation may be less detailed than Japanese docs
No webhooks — must poll for diagram modification events
Nulab ecosystem lock-in — best value when also using Backlog and Typetalk
Data residency options are US or Japan — EU customers should verify data location
Rate limits not fully documented — test limits before production integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US and Japan data residency. OAuth2 for user-delegated access. Japanese company with strong security culture. Diagram content may contain confidential architecture and network topology — restrict team access. No fine-grained OAuth scopes — full account access per OAuth grant. Shared diagrams accessible via URL — configure access controls per diagram.
